description: HYBRID physics+LSTM residual — physical backbone overfits fold_2
LTC CfC n_hidden=64 dt=4s — best so far
LTC n_hidden=128 — overfits, worse than n_hidden=64
DynamicLTC input-dependent gating — more flexible but overfits more
LTC-64 frozen tau — same as trainable tau, tau not the overfitting source
LTC-64 smaller f_net/ic_net [32] — underfits dynamics, val=0.396
ESN n=500 fixed reservoir + linear readout — linear readout insufficient for nonlinear tank dynamics
TCN 8-layer dilated causal conv — severe overfitting (train=0.013, val=0.784)
StackedLTC 2-stage cascade [32+32] — balanced folds (0.303/0.320) but worse than LTC-64
LTC-64 dropout_prob=0.2 — balanced folds (0.284/0.320) but worse than no-dropout (0.249)
LTC-64 hidden_noise_std=0.05 — state noise hurts fold_1 (0.290) without helping fold_2
